aboutMe.title: Backend Developer
aboutMe.desc: My name is Natalya Baranova. I am a backend developer looking for opportunities for professional growth. I have over 10 years of experience working with databases at the Ministry of Economic Development, where I also developed a custom solution using MS Access. Later, I transitioned into web development and worked with PHP using frameworks such as Laravel (versions 9/11), Yii2, and Symfony (versions 5/6). Currently, I have been working for over a year with Symfony 6.4 and PHP at an insurance company — https://euro-ins.ru. In my work, I follow Domain-Driven Design (DDD) principles and clean code practices. I also use containerization and, when needed, utilize Grafana k6 for load testing.
